matched_services.blurb: This service are for those with a thick to very thick density hair. Your hair will be shampooed, conditioned, and placed under a steamer to get that moisture back into your scalp and hair. Hair will then be blowdried, cut and pressed out. During the cut i will take pictures to show you where we need to cut the hair off to begin the healthy hair journey and we will come to an agreement of where we can cut.
matched_services.name: (RETURNING CLIENTS ONLY) Silk press with Cut (THICKER AND OR LONGER HAIR)

reviews.review_text: She did an outstanding job on my both of my daughters hair! Very professional and pleasant. She will be their stylist for a long time!

I can happily say I’ve been going to Channing for a year now and had her do every style she offered on my head! Micro links, Itips, sew in, silk press, etc. I can say with ease she KILLED every hair style!

reviews.review_text:
1000% recommend Courtney! She is so personable, very passionate about her work, quick, super friendly, and so knowledgeable on products for maintaining your hairstyle!
I have been looking for a permanent hair braiding stylist since I moved here 3 years ago! She’s the one!
Honestly told her to do whatever she thought best n she really went above my hair isn’t to heavy, it’s cute n so soft I can function with it as well.
Courtney is absolutely amazing. She left me looking right & is super friendly. She made sure I was good and offered me snacks & drinks. Definitely recommend & will be back again :)
Thanks Courtney!! I’ll be seeing you again

reviews.review_text: Tatiana welcomed me in, had great vibes, good conversations, and made me feel comfortable. She’s a jack of all trades! My lashes look AMAZING! I’m excited to try different styles in the future. 10/10 experience. BOOK HER NOW!

Had an amazing experience after a disappointing visit to another stylist. The first stylist charged the same price for a takedown but didn’t include a wash/blow-dry, leaving me frustrated and panicked. Thankfully, Tatiana came to the rescue and completely turned things around! She was personable, thoughtful, and attentive. She even asked if I wanted water or music to make me feel comfortable. Although she was running behind, she sent me a text ahead of time. She took her time to do things right.

My lashes lasted three weeks before I needed a refill. Tatiana made sure I knew how to wash and care for my lashes. She followed up with me which is top notch customer service ! I love the way my lashes look classic with some flare.
Tatiana was really awesome! I definitely will be going back and would highly recommend her.

reviews.review_text: Starr is very accommodating and caring! She talked me through every process before doing it and during. She took her time to answer my questions and give me tips. She colored my and started my locs which came out perfect! So excited to have her as my lotician!
reviews.service_name: Starter Locs, Deep Conditioning, Bleach, Demi/permanent color

reviews.review_text: This was by far the best experience I had at a hair salon ever! She is gifted and so personable. She is the only person allowed to touch my locs

Relaxed stress-free vibe. Starr genuinely listens to your concerns. She is very knowledgeable and makes it her business to educate you on healthy hair practices. My locs are healthy and thriving thanks to her.
This was my first service with Starr, and it was a delightful experience. Starr is personable, professional, and attentive to hair needs. I highly recommend Starr.
